workbench_page_save_analysis_title: Save this Workbench configuration as a re-openable, shareable analysis
workbench_page_new_analysis_title: Clear the Workbench and start a new analysis from the scope editor
workbench_window_add_panel_title: Add a new panel via the ScopeEditor
workbench_panel_lock_title: Locked from Probe Dossier — return to Dossier to recombine
workbench_panel_edit_scope_title: Configure this panel's scope (probes, sources, discourse-function restriction)
workbench_disclosure_independent_axes_bo: Putting “{metric}” on one shared axis across cultural contexts would assert cross-cultural commensurability, which requires a validated equivalence grant — none exists yet for this metric. Each cell keeps its own optimal scale; read positions within a cell, not across.
workbench_disclosure_facet_unavailable_b: is unavailable for a multi-source / multi-group panel (it would cover only the first). Use
composition or a single source to facet.
workbench_disclosure_brush_hint_pre: ↔ Click a mark to highlight that article in linked
workbench_disclosure_brush_hint_post: panels in this window (click again to clear).
workbench_grid_cooccurrence_refusal: The co-occurrence network renders a single relational graph, not a grid of small multiples. This panel resolves to more than one cell (multiple sources / groups / probes under a Split composition). Switch the composition to Merged (all sources pooled into one graph) or scope a single source.
workbench_grid_merged_cross_probe_refusa: Merged composition pools more than one probe onto a single shared axis for "{metric}", a scaled metric — that reads as a cross-context ranking, which AĒR does not render (Brief §1.3). Switch this Panel to split or overlay, narrow it to one probe, or choose a pure-count metric.
workbench_grid_no_shared_dimension_pre: No categorical dimension is shared across the scoped sources. Enable a partial field via
workbench_grid_no_shared_dimension_post: in the panel config, or use a cell's config to peek at one source's own dimension.
workbench_grid_facet_empty_post: in the active scope — nothing to facet by.
workbench_grid_no_sources: No sources in the active scope.
workbench_grid_facet_disclosure_capped: (top {max} by article count; the rest are omitted)
workbench_grid_facet_disclosure_post: . Each sub-cell holds only articles carrying that value.
workbench_cell_custom_badge_title: This cell is on a custom configuration — not directly comparable to its sibling cells.
workbench_cell_config_btn_title: Per-cell configuration — override the panel default for this cell only
workbench_cell_peek_banner_mid: — a different dimension than this panel's
workbench_cell_peek_banner_post: . Not comparable to the sibling cells.
workbench_scope_editor_hint: Configure the corpus this Panel analyses. Pick probes, optionally restrict to a discourse function, then choose sources. Add scope groups to compare scopes side by side.
workbench_scope_editor_add_group_title: Add a parallel scope group for side-by-side comparison
workbench_scope_editor_apply_disabled_ti: Each scope group needs at least one probe.
workbench_scope_group_step_probes_hint: Pick one or more probes for this scope group.
workbench_scope_group_step_df_hint: Optional. Dim sources that don't carry the chosen function.
workbench_scope_sources_step_hint: Within the selected probes. Leave empty to include the whole probe.
workbench_scope_sources_pick_probe: Pick at least one probe in step 1 to see its sources here.
workbench_scope_sources_select_all_title: Include all matching sources of this probe
workbench_scope_sources_df_tag_title: Primary discourse function (provisional, source-level; per-article Phase 122a deferred)
workbench_aleph_aria_label: Aleph — synchronic snapshot of the dataset
workbench_aleph_no_sources: No sources in the active scope.
workbench_episteme_window_note: Showing the last 7 days · widen a panel's window for the full history
workbench_episteme_window_note_title: Episteme is the diachronic pillar — it defaults to a fixed recent window so a rare recently-edited older article can't distort the shared time axis. Set a panel's window (or the global range) to widen toward the full history; no data is dropped.
workbench_episteme_no_sources: No sources in the active scope.
workbench_episteme_add_stratum_title: Multi-stratum stack lands in a follow-up iteration
workbench_rhizome_aria_label: Rhizome — relational currents in the discourse
workbench_rhizome_no_sources: No sources in the active scope.
workbench_ccp_note_custom_post: configuration — not directly comparable to its sibling cells.
workbench_ccp_note_inheriting: Inheriting the panel default for every lever.
workbench_ccp_cell_dimension_select_titl: Peek at a different dimension for this cell only — off-comparison, valid for this cell's source.
workbench_ccp_scale_title_forced_free: This cell's X/Y axis is custom, so it measures different metrics than its siblings and can't share their scale — it always reads on its own.
workbench_ccp_scale_title: Shared: this cell sits on the panel's union axis (comparable). Free: this cell scales to its own data.
workbench_meth_known_limitations_pill_ti: Known limitations apply to this metric
workbench_meta_clear_df_lock_title: Clear the discourse-function lock for this panel
